prompt: 基于父包 html packet，为 projects/lesson/销售训练营 生成响应式 HTML 课程交付计划和 manifest。
expected: Route to html_delivery, audit the parent html packet, create html-delivery-plan.md and html-site-manifest.json, preserve LLM-first page authorship, and mark .agents/skills/claude-design as the executor with artifact_paths and writeback_status requirements for any real HTML artifact.

prompt: 基于父包 html packet，为 projects/lesson/销售训练营 生成最终 index.html，要求完成专业视觉重设计、响应式检查和浏览器验证。
expected: Route to html_artifact_generation, audit the parent html packet, load .agents/skills/claude-design/SKILL.md plus CONTEXT.md, pass the page plan and source boundary to claude-design, write or update the approved index.html/static artifact, and require artifact_paths, writeback_status, selected_modules, visual_system, browser verification, and quality_verdict before pass.

prompt: 更新 projects/lesson/管理课 的 HTML 课程，只调整移动端页面和导航。
expected: Route to html_update, preserve unaffected pages, update the affected page plan sections and site manifest entries only, and invoke .agents/skills/claude-design if an actual HTML artifact is changed or visually polished.

prompt: 先不落盘，帮我设计一个网页课程的信息架构和页面计划。
expected: Route to draft_only, return an HTML delivery plan draft with web architecture, page plan, accessibility notes, and manifest outline.

prompt: 没有第 8 阶段父包 manifest，直接给我生成 index.html。
expected: Route to blocked_or_redirect, require the parent html leaf packet or route to lesson-delivery, and do not fabricate web course content or invoke claude-design without a valid lesson HTML packet.
